creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your report. Could you please:

- Confirm your FreeBSD version (uname -a)
- Test Python 3.11, 3.8 and 3.7 (building from upstream sources directly where needed)
- Create an issue upstream [1], adding upstream issue to See Also when created.


[1] https://github.com/python/cpython/issues
